case_title: ROBERT STRONG VS. ELAINE NEUWIRTH et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-24-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRONG, ROBERT SERVED APR-01-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEUWIRTH, ELAINE
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR MARGOLIN, EPHRAIM
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRONG, ROBERT JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-29-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ELAINE NEUWIRTH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT NEUWIRTH, ELAINE

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STRONG, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEUWIRTH, ELAINE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRONG, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT NEUWIRTH, ELAINE DOES 1 TO 50 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-24-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-09-2013

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT NEUWIRTH, ELAINE HEARING SET FOR MAY-29-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-08-2013. THE JUN-11-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEUWIRTH, ELAINE
ARBITRATOR JAMES MOUSHEGIAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-08-2013 THROUGH OCT-06-2013.
ARBITRATOR EPHRAIM MARGOLIN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-22-2013 THROUGH OCT-20-2013.
PAYMENT OF WAIVED FEES (APR-29-2013 FIRST PAPER RESPONSE/PLEADING $2,500 - $10,000) (CONFIDENTIAL) PAID BY DEFENDANT NEUWIRTH, ELAINE
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
